name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N \in Nat

(* Types *)
Forks == [1..N -> 0..1]  (* 0: free, 1: held *)
States == [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper predicates *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Free(i) == forks[i] = 0
Held(i) == forks[i] = 1

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ Free(Left(i)) /\ Free(Right(i))
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 1, ![Right(i)] = 1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Invariant: No two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in Forks
          /\ states \in States
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : 

                    forks[Left(i)] = 1 /\ forks[Right(i)] = 1

                    forks[Left(i)] = 0 \/ forks[Right(i)] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
      /\ flag = <<>>

Next == /\ num' = num + 1
      /\ flag' = Append(flag, 0)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm'}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
